[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001001010 3
1 1011001000 4
2 0010000000 1
3 0000000010 1
4 0001001110 4
5 1110111110 8
6 1010001000 3
7 0000000010 1

01 10 0000000010 1 match 3 7
12 21 0001001010 3 match 0
23 32 1011001000 4 match 1
34 43 0010000000 1 match 2
45 54 0000000000 a
56 65 0000000000 a
67 76 0100000110 3
70 07 0100000010 2

02 20 0000100010 2
13 31 0001001000 2
24 42 0010000010 2
35 53 0001001000 2
46 64 0000000010 1 match 3 7
57 75 0000001000 1
60 06 0100100010 3
71 17 0000001111 4

14 41 0000000010 1 match 3 7
25 52 0001001000 2
36 63 0000000000 a
47 74 0010000010 2
50 05 0000000000 a
61 16 0000000110 2
72 27 1010011010 5

04 40 0000000010 1 match 3 7
15 51 0001001000 2
26 62 0000100010 2
37 73 1010001000 3 match 6
